name: python3-ping3
title: python3-ping3
summary: Python module and command to ping hosts using raw sockets
description:
Python module and command to ping hosts using raw sockets
Ping3 is a pure Python 3 implementation of the ICMP ping implementation using
raw sockets.
.
In some configurations, ICMP messages can only be sent from processes running
as root.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3 and ping3 command.

commands.name: ping3
commands.description: ICMP ping using raw sockets implemented in Python 3
